_comment: ByrdHouse config v1 (Blueprint v2 §4). ONE copy at %BYRDHOUSE_ROOT% on each machine. Scripts read this file — no script may hardcode a host, port, or path. Use Tailscale MagicDNS names, never raw IPs. THIS FILE IS A TEMPLATE: real values (tokens, model names) live only on the machines, never in git.

startup._comment: Used by start-byrdhouse.ps1. comfyui_dir holds your ComfyUI launcher (portable installs: run_nvidia_gpu.bat). run_router=true hosts the belt API on THIS machine — true on GAMING until BYRD-MINI is set up, then flip it to false here, true on MINI, and point services.router at byrd-mini. run_worker=true runs the job daemon (GAMING only).

backup._comment: backup-nightly.ps1 mirrors db/, artifacts/, recipes/, docs/, workflows/ + config here. Point at BYRD-VAULT's share or any second physical disk.

image._comment: Defaults for the byrdimage submit layer (scripts/byrdimage.py). faceswap_*: the ReActor face-swap route (docs/FACE_LAB.md) — restore model must exist in ComfyUI/models/facerestore_models; blend checkpoint is resolved by loose name like any checkpoint.

training._comment: LoRA lab (scripts/collect-training-images.ps1 + scripts/train-lora.ps1). sd_scripts_dir/trainer_python empty = auto-detect. vram_budget_mb: training refuses to start unless at least this much VRAM is free AND its settings are sized to stay under it (founder rule: never exceed 7200MB on the 8GB 3070). cpu_threads: how many CPU threads the trainer may use (founder rule: 16-18 of the 20).

gpu._comment: nvidia_smi: leave blank to auto-discover (PATH, then C:/Windows/System32/nvidia-smi.exe) — set the full .exe path only if discovery fails. vram_free_threshold_mb is the minimum free VRAM to enter IMAGE mode; vram_image_healthy_mb is the level below which we warn about possible SDXL OOM on the 8GB 3070 (warn only, still proceeds).

memory._comment: Used by byrd-status for the SQLite-vs-Qdrant drift check. Fill in real values on BYRD-MINI; leave placeholders elsewhere and the check reports 'not configured' (yellow).

mcp._comment: Active MCP roster (ROOM_MAP rules: max 8, every server earns a room, adding #9 retires one). byrd-status pings every entry that has a 'ping' URL.
